text.title: Go → TypeScript DTO Contract via tygo Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Frontend has /types/api.ts hand-edited; drifts from Go.
antipattern.root-cause: No codegen pipeline; types written by frontend engineer.
antipattern.fix: Generate from Go; delete hand-edited file; add the CI diff gate.

antipattern.symptom: tygo.yaml exists but generated TS is committed only when developer remembers.
antipattern.root-cause: No CI step enforces fresh regen.

antipattern.symptom: TS types have `any` everywhere for time / decimal fields.
antipattern.fix: Add explicit mappings (time.Time → string, decimal.Decimal → string).
